one_line_summary: Flawless implementation of the double-agent TDD flow with robust orchestration, comprehensive tests, and excellent abstraction reuse.
strengths: Perfect reuse of existing agent invocation (run_agent) and CLI session builder infrastructure.
Comprehensive test suite verifying phase transitions, RED/GREEN separation, and end-to-end integration.
Exceptional documentation, including a detailed ADR, worked wiki examples, and clear CLI help text.
weaknesses: None; the candidate met and exceeded all outlined requirements.
